betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Derrick§f is an early oil extraction structure for pulling §bCrude Oil§f from underground deposits.

§eSetup:§f
• Place derrick above an §boil deposit§f (use §bSurvey Scanner§f to locate)
• Supply power to begin extraction
• Connect to fluid pipes for collection

§eOperation:§f
• Slower than Pumpjacks but cheaper to build
• Good for initial oil exploration
• Extract oil from shallow deposits

§aTips:§f
• Upgrade to §bPumpjacks§f for better efficiency
• Consider multiple derricks on large deposits
• Pair with §bRefinery§f for processing chain
